tools.name: search_ncbi_gene_records
tools.description: Search NCBI gene resources for genes associated with a query and organism.

query.description: Gene symbol, pathway, or text query.

organism.description: Optional organism filter such as Homo sapiens.

tools.name: get_ncbi_gene_summary
tools.description: Retrieve a structured summary for a gene record from NCBI.

tools.name: get_ncbi_protein_summary
tools.description: Retrieve a structured summary for a protein accession from NCBI resources.
